title: WarriorTutor
author: Aarav Karumanchi
description: RAG-based tutoring assistant trained on Westwood's AP Physics and Calculus BC past exams. Answers questions with cited sources from the curriculum.

title: CafeteriaVision
author: Isaac Gong
description: Real-time computer vision model that detects cafeteria crowding from a live feed and predicts wait times. Deployed as a web app during school hours.

title: MarketBot
author: Arjun Mehta
description: PPO agent trained on 10 years of S&P 500 data. Currently paper-trading with a Sharpe ratio of 1.4. Built as a deep dive into financial RL.

title: PulsePolitics
author: Reett Aulakh
description: Sentiment analysis dashboard scraping Reddit and Twitter/X for political discourse trends. Visualizes topic shifts over time using a fine-tuned RoBERTa model.

title: SignSense
author: Priya Nair
description: ASL fingerspelling recognition using MediaPipe hand landmarks fed into a lightweight LSTM. Runs in real-time at 60fps in the browser via TensorFlow.js.

title: EssayCoach
author: Aanya Pathak
description: College essay feedback tool using Claude API with a custom rubric for Westwood's most common prompts. Gives specific, non-generic revision suggestions.

title: RetentionML
author: Shruti Sivaraman
description: XGBoost pipeline predicting student club drop-off using attendance and engagement signals. Built to help officers identify at-risk members early.

title: DoomRunner
author: Aarav Karumanchi
description: DQN agent that learned to navigate and survive in Doom's first level purely from pixel inputs. Trained for 72 hours on a borrowed GPU — peaked at 94% episode completion.
